markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Calibrate on content strategy and review a refreshed article.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Primary Goal: Leads, Not Traffic.** Content success is measured by startup leads, not organic traffic. This dictates a strategy focused on G-O-A-I-O (Google/AI Overviews) and unique value, as a recent Google update severely impacted Brex's rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
  - [**"Soft Sell" Brex:** Avoid direct promotion. Instead, integrate Brex naturally via case studies, customer quotes, or a dedicated CTA block before the conclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [**Create Proprietary Data:** Develop unique statistics from Brex's user data to build authority and create content that AI cannot replicate, making it more valuable and rankable.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Strict Internal Linking:** Use only one internal link per target page. The current UI (simple underline) is a known issue that cannot be changed.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Recent Google Update Impact:** A recent algorithm update caused significant ranking drops (e.g., from top 5 to \>30) for some Brex pages.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The update is targeting AI-generated content patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Action:** Jon will analyze the SERP for the reviewed article's keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
          - [**Initial Finding:** Top results are dominated by large banks with high domain authority, suggesting the article may not rank for SEO but remains valuable for G-O-A-I-O.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
  - [**Content Uniqueness:** The strategy must prioritize unique value to stand out from the "groupthink" of AI-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
      - [**Example:** The "Hidden Cost of Business Banking" article succeeded by exposing competitor fees that were difficult to find, even for AI.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
      - [**Goal:** Replicate this success by finding and sharing information that is not easily discoverable.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

### Article Refresh Review

  - [**Objective:** Improve G-O-A-I-O performance by making the article more LLM-friendly.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Key Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Style:** "Inverted pyramid" structure with a "finance reporter" tone.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Internal Links:** Increased from 3 to 8.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Data:** Added reputable statistics and tables for authority.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [**Feedback & Refinements:**](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Keyword Cannibalization:** Avoid creating content that competes with existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
          - [**Action:** Remove one FAQ suggestion that targets a keyword already covered by a Brex article.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [**Header Hierarchy:** Use H3s for sub-sections if they are not planned as standalone articles. This helps Google and AI understand the content structure.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [**Meta Description:** The current suggestion feels generic. Jon prefers a more human-written, two-sentence description, as Google often overwrites them for SEO anyway.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
      - [**External Links:** Jon will verify all sources and noted a potential new article idea: "Operating Agreement."](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### Proprietary Data Initiative

  - [**Problem:** Brex lacks a centralized bank of proprietary statistics.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** Create unique data from Brex's user base (e.g., spending trends, application times) to build authority and provide content that AI cannot replicate.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Role:** Suggest data points that would strengthen specific articles.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Precedent:** GrowthX built a custom knowledge base for client Biologica to ensure all cited data was proprietary and factually accurate.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jon:**](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [Analyze the SERP for the refreshed article's keyword to confirm SEO potential.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
      - [Implement feedback on the refreshed article (remove FAQ, verify links, check for cannibalization).](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [Begin organizing a bank of proprietary Brex statistics.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
      - [Update the refreshed article based on Jon's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [Suggest data points from Brex's user base that would strengthen upcoming articles.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [Schedule a call with Jon to demo the GrowthX platform, roadmap, and pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/C231J4fFB6Xunwv7ZVkjyLrLhmz_X4DA?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
